title: EPIC: Core Feature Implementation
description: Build all the actual features that make RickTerminal useful: Kanban board, Morty tracking, terminal integration, ticket management, team collaboration, and all the CRUD operations. This is where the magic happens - or as Morty would call it, 'the confusing stuff that somehow works.'
acceptance_criteria: Kanban board displays tickets with drag-drop functionality
Real-time Morty tracking dashboard shows all active claude subprocess agents
Integrated terminal executes commands with Rick persona responses
Ticket CRUD operations persist to SQLite and sync across views
Team collaboration view displays parallel Morty work streams
Session persistence maintains state across app restarts
